Package doghotel

Class DogHotel

java.lang.Object
doghotel.DogHotel
public class DogHotel extends Object
The driver for the Dog Hotel problem.
To model several good strategies for students.
  • Creates a Hotel object,
  • Reads the input file,
  • Displays a menu,
  • Validates input,
  • Executes based on user input using a switch statement.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    backup(String fileName, Date today)
    This method is complete DO NOT CHANGE
    Backs up the current hotel guests into a data file.
    Since the computer system is powered down at night, we
    need to write the current guests out to a file that can be
    read in the next morning.
    void
    displayGreeting()
    A method that retrieves the system date and time and greets the user.
    void

    This method is complete, DO NOT CHANGE
    Displays a menu for the user to select from.

    getOwner(Scanner in)
    This method is complete, DO NOT CHANGE
    We need this information in two instances: checking a guest in and
    checking a guest out, so making it a method keeps from repeating
    the same code.
    int

    A method that reads the file and loads the guests

  • Method Details

    • readGuestFile

      public void readGuestFile(String fileName)
      A method that reads the file and loads the guests
      You need to write this one! Input Data Format:
      birth_date breed
      weight name owner room_number check_in_date
      Parameters:
      fileName - an input file name

    • displayMenu

      public void displayMenu()
      This method is complete, DO NOT CHANGE
      Displays a menu for the user to select from.

    • getValidIntInput

      public int getValidIntInput(Scanner in, int low, int high, String message)
      This method is complete, DO NOT CHANGE
      Gets an integer from the user in the range of min to max
      Parameters:
      in - a Scanner object to read from the keyboard
      low - the lowest acceptable number for input
      high - the highest acceptable number for input
      message - the kind of input we are looking for
      Returns:
      a valid integer input

    • getGuestInfo

      public Object getGuestInfo(Scanner in)
      This method is complete, DO NOT CHANGE
      Acquires all of the guest information and creates a guest.
      Parameters:
      in - A Scanner Object
      Returns:
      a Guest object with everything but a room number and
      check in date.

    • getOwner

      public String getOwner(Scanner in)
      This method is complete, DO NOT CHANGE
      We need this information in two instances: checking a guest in and
      checking a guest out, so making it a method keeps from repeating
      the same code.
      Parameters:
      in - A Scanner Object
      Returns:
      a String

    • backup

      public void backup(String fileName, Date today)
      This method is complete DO NOT CHANGE
      Backs up the current hotel guests into a data file.
      Since the computer system is powered down at night, we
      need to write the current guests out to a file that can be
      read in the next morning.
      Parameters:
      fileName - the fileName that we are writing to.
      today - the system date

    • displayGreeting

      public void displayGreeting()
      A method that retrieves the system date and time and greets the user. Initializes the property today.

    • run

      public void run(String[] args)
      Driver for the DogHotel project.
      This method is complete, DO NOT CHANGE
      Parameters:
      args - the command line arguments

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main method.
      Parameters:
      args - the command line arguments
